insights.title: Checkout has too many steps
insights.description: Users repeatedly mention having to click through 5-6 screens before completing a purchase, causing drop-off.

insights.title: Guest checkout without account
insights.description: Users want to complete a purchase without being forced to create an account first.

insights.title: No real-time delivery updates
insights.description: Customers say tracking information is stale and doesn't reflect actual courier location.

insights.title: Love the try-before-you-buy flow
insights.description: Multiple users called out the try-at-home flow as a key reason they chose FitWardrobe over competitors.

insights.title: Add UPI and wallet payment options
insights.description: Several respondents dropped off at payment because their preferred method wasn't supported.

insights.title: Returns process is confusing
insights.description: Users can't find the return initiation flow and end up contacting support instead.

insights.title: Is there a size-exchange option?
insights.description: Repeated question in support tickets about whether exchanges are supported without a full return.

insights.title: Pricing unclear at checkout
insights.description: Shipping fees appear only on the final step, leading to cart abandonment.

insights.title: Onboarding quiz feels personal
insights.description: New users say the style quiz during onboarding made recommendations feel curated.

insights.title: Save multiple delivery addresses
insights.description: Small business users want to switch between office and warehouse addresses quickly.

insights.title: Payment retries fail silently
insights.description: Users report no error message when a payment fails, just a spinning loader.

insights.title: Do prices include GST?
insights.description: Common pre-purchase question that isn't answered clearly on the product page.
